zh.Albury, Surrey, England: 英國英格蘭素瑞阿爾布瑞
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry de Weston於1200年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾德 聖 瑪麗時，他的父親William de Weston30歲，母親Juliana de Aquilon25歲。他於1231年與Cecelia de Tangley在英國英格蘭素瑞阿爾布瑞結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他於1225年在英國英格蘭素瑞被列為chief justice of assize。他去世於1238年在英國英格蘭素可瓦恩哈姆享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry de Weston于1200年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾德 聖 瑪麗时，他的父亲William de Weston30岁，母亲Juliana de Aquilon25岁。他于1231年与Cecelia de Tangley在英国英格兰素瑞阿爾布瑞结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他于1225年在英国英格兰素瑞被列为chief justice of assize。他去世于1238年在英国英格兰素可瓦恩哈姆享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: Weston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of numerous places called Weston, from Old English west ‘west’ + tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’.

topographic name from Middle English atte west tun(e) ‘at the west farmstead, settlement’ (Old English west + tūn), or from Middle English (bi) weste(n)tune (Old English be westan tūne or be west in tūne), denoting someone who lived either to the west of a settlement or in the western part of a settlement. The latter was a common surname in Sussex.

variants.name: Wesson
meanings: English (Midlands and Kent): variant of   Weston  .
History: John Wesson came from England to Salem, MA, in 1644.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry de Weston was born in 1200, in Tydd Saint Mary, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Weston, was 30 and his mother, Juliana de Aquilon, was 25. He married Cecelia de Tangley in 1231, in Albury, Surrey, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. In 1225, at the age of 25, his occupation is listed as chief justice of assize in Surrey, England, United Kingdom. He died in 1238, in Warnham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 38.

fr.Tydd Saint Mary, South Holland, Lincolns: Tydd Saint Mary, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry de Weston est né en 1200, à Tydd Saint Mary, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Weston, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Juliana de Aquilon, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Cecelia de Tangley en 1231, à Albury, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. En 1225, à l’âge de 25 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est chief justice of assize à Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en 1238, à Warnham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.Tydd Saint Mary, South Holland, Lincolns: Tydd Saint Mary, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Henry de Weston 1200 in Tydd Saint Mary, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Weston 30 und seine Mutter Juliana de Aquilon 25. Er hat 1231 in Albury, Surrey, England, United Kingdom Cecelia de Tangley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. 1225, als er 25 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als chief justice of assize in Surrey, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb 1238 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Warnham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

it.Tydd Saint Mary, South Holland, Lincolns: Tydd Saint Mary, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito
it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Weston è nato il nel 1200 nel Tydd Saint Mary, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Weston, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Juliana de Aquilon, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Cecelia de Tangley nel 1231, nel Albury, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Nel 1225, all'età di 25 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come chief justice of assize nel Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1238, nel Warnham, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry de Westonが1200年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアトイッド サイント マリーで生まれた時，父William de Westonは30歳，母Juliana de Aquilonは25歳であった。1231年にイギリスイギリススリーアルブリーでCecelia de Tangleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。1225年，25歳の時，イギリスイギリススリーでの職業はchief justice of assizeと記録されている。彼は1238年にイギリスイギリススセックスワーンハムで38歳で死去した。

ko.Tydd Saint Mary, South Holland, Lincolns: 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 타이드 세인트 메리
ko.lifeSummary: Henry de Weston(이)가 1200년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 타이드 세인트 메리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Weston(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Juliana de Aquilon(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1231년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 알버이에서 Cecelia de Tangley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 1225년, 25세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 수리에서 chief justice of assize이었다. 그는 1238년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 워함에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Tydd Saint Mary, South Holland, Lincolns: Tydd Saint Mary, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Weston nasceu em 1200, em Tydd Saint Mary, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Weston, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Juliana de Aquilon, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Cecelia de Tangley em 1231, em Albury, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Em 1225, com 25 anos, sua profissão aparece como chief justice of assize em Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 1238, em Warnham, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 38 anos.

ru.Tydd Saint Mary, South Holland, Lincolns: тидд сеинт мэри, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry de Weston родился в 1200 г. в местности тидд сеинт мэри, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Weston было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Juliana de Aquilon, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecelia de Tangley в 1231 г. в местности албури, сурри, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. В 1225 году, в возрасте 25 лет,  он работал по профессии chief justice of assize в местности сурри, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер в 1238 г. в местности варнам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry de Weston nació en 1200, en Tydd Saint Mary, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Weston, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Juliana de Aquilon, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Cecelia de Tangley en 1231, en Albury, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. En 1225, a la edad de 25 años, su ocupación registrada era chief justice of assize en Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió en 1238, en Warnham, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 38 años.
